testCases.query: What are the best patterns for writing unit tests?
expectedBehavior: Redirects to testing-unit sub-skill for isolated business logic tests
Mentions that testing-patterns was split into 5 focused sub-skills in v7.2.0
Does not provide inline testing guidance — defers to the sub-skill

testCases.query: Set up Playwright E2E tests with page objects
expectedBehavior: Redirects to testing-e2e sub-skill for Playwright and E2E patterns
Lists all 5 sub-skills so user can find the right one
Does not provide Playwright patterns directly

testCases.query: How do I set up load testing with k6?
expectedBehavior: Redirects to testing-perf sub-skill for k6 and load testing patterns
Clearly indicates testing-patterns is a redirect skill, not a content skill
Does not attempt to provide k6 configuration inline

testCases.query: How do I test my LLM integration with DeepEval?
expectedBehavior: Redirects to testing-llm sub-skill for LLM evaluation and mocking
Notes testing-llm covers DeepEval, RAGAS, and structured output validation
Does not provide DeepEval patterns directly

testCases.query: Give me detailed pytest fixture scoping advice
expectedBehavior: Should NOT provide detailed testing guidance directly
Should redirect to the appropriate sub-skill (testing-unit for pytest fixtures)
The skill itself has disable-model-invocation: true and provides no inline patterns
